overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open prairies at night. The character traverses natural wilderness with scattered oak trees and rock formations, encountering a horse rider crossing the path near the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy terrain, flanked by trees on both sides

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through tall grass
cluster of oak trees on the left horizon
dense cluster of oak trees on the right side
large gray rock formation visible ahead on the right
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds and moonlight

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through open prairie land at night. Oak trees line both sides of the trail while a large rock outcropping looms ahead on the right. The sky is dark with scattered clouds illuminated by moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with rock formations and distant hills

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens up, passing large rocks on the right

entered.detail: rolling grass-covered hills visible in the distance ahead
sparse scattered trees on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves into more open terrain as the dense trees on the right fall behind. The path continues toward distant grassy hills while the character passes close to the large rock formation on the right. The left side trees remain visible but more distant.

events.description: horse rider crosses the path from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking forward as a horse rider suddenly crosses the path from the right

notable_agents.action: riding a horse at gallop across the path from right to left

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the grassy hills, a horse rider suddenly crosses the path from right to left. The rock outcropping and right-side trees have been left behind, while the left-side trees grow closer. The terrain remains open grassland under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit prairie trail that transitions from a tree-lined path into an open grassland. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt path flanked by oak trees, with a large rock outcropping looming ahead under a dark, cloudy sky. As the character advances, the dense trees on the right fall away and the terrain opens up, bringing the camera closer to the massive rock formation. The scene then shifts toward distant grassy hills as the rock and right-side foliage disappear behind the character, while the trees on the left draw nearer. Finally, as the character reaches the open grassland, a horse rider suddenly crosses the path from right to left.
